version_name: ML Pipeline — Phase 4 (bandit + CF in the UI)
features: GraphSAGE-based graph neural network for connection prediction (functions/ml_models.R + scripts/train_connection_predictor_gnn.R). 2-layer encoder produces 32-dim node embeddings; existence head consumes [h_s; h_t; h_s ⊙ h_t]. Retrospective validation: precision@5 = 0.086 vs base 0.057 (+51%); recall@10 = 0.100 vs 0.081 (+23%).

BERT chunk-classification head for SES element extraction (functions/ml_element_classifier.R + scripts/train_element_classifier.R). 7-way classifier on top of frozen sentence-transformer embedding. Test accuracy 61% (4.3× random baseline of 14.3%) on 1367 KB-derived (text, category) pairs.

LinUCB contextual bandit for response-measure prioritization (functions/ml_response_bandit.R + scripts/warm_start_response_bandit.R). 32-dim context vector, 3 priority arms (high/medium/low), warm-started from 251 KB response-related connections.

Collaborative filtering for SES recommendations (functions/ml_collaborative_filter.R + scripts/warm_start_cf.R). Truncated-SVD on a 44 × 1458 user × item matrix derived from KB contexts + production templates. Density 2.7%; rank 12.

Pilot study instrumentation (modules/pilot_study_module.R + docs/ml_pilot_protocol.md + docs/ml_pilot_consent_form.md + scripts/pilot_analysis.R). URL-param conditional activation (?pilot_condition=A|B), session timing, NASA-TLX modal, hashed participant IDs, paired Wilcoxon analysis with Bonferroni correction.

Transformer-based text embeddings (Phase 2A): functions/ml_text_embeddings.R adds a 'transformer' strategy backed by the R `text` package (sentence-transformers/all-MiniLM-L6-v2, 384-dim). Selected at startup via MARINESABRES_EMBEDDING_STRATEGY env var; auto-preferred when the `text` package is available. Cached per-element-name to avoid re-encoding.

Similarity-guided transfer-learning fine-tuning (Phase 2B): scripts/fine_tune_for_template.R scores target-vs-other template similarity and selects LR + freezing schedule. Ships fine-tuned checkpoints for coastal_lagoon, climate_change, fisheries.

Retrospective validation pipeline: scripts/retrospective_validation.R masks 20% of human-validated positives per template, ranks all candidate pairs, and reports precision@k / recall@k. Macro-averaged precision@10 ≈ 0.057 (≈7× the ~0.008 random baseline); recall@20 ≈ 0.153.
docs/ML_METHODS.md: paper-ready pipeline documentation with explicit out-of-scope statements (no GNN, no BERT-from-scratch, no RL, no collaborative filtering).
docs/RETROSPECTIVE_VALIDATION.md: measured retrieval metrics backing the ESP 2026 abstract.

PIMS-style persistence pattern applied to three modules (pims_stakeholder, response_module, isa_data_entry): sync_to_project_data() helper + observeEvent on project_id to load. ADR-12 in docs/ARCHITECTURE.md.
Stable categorical keys for localized selectInputs (Power/Interest in pims, Effectiveness/Feasibility in response): setNames() so internal comparisons stay locale-independent. ADR-11.
Event-bus emit_* functions wrapped in shiny::isolate() — closes 10 pre-existing test failures and prevents observers from registering reactive dependencies on events they emit. ADR-13.
Workflow stepper 5 step-name keys added across all 9 languages (45 translation entries).
Scenario Builder 'Add new link' silent req() aborts replaced with user-visible toasts.
Feedback modal browser_info input ID renamed to match the post-ef005fb modal JS.
Deploy-script hardening: docs/images/*.png exclude (instead of *.png blanket), production user-data preservation around the wipe-and-extract.

critical.issue: ISA Data Entry edits never reached the project save file (modules/isa_data_entry_module.R had zero writes to project_data_reactive in 1352 lines).
critical.impact: Silent data loss — users' Standard Entry work vanished on session restart and never appeared in saved project files.
critical.resolution: sync_to_project_data() called after every save_exN observer (8), add_loop, and per-panel Remove (6). project_id-keyed load observer replaces the unguarded observe() that was also re-clobbering in-progress edits.

critical.issue: ISA Data Entry per-panel Remove only deleted the DOM panel, not the stored data.frame row. Ghost rows then re-rendered as visible duplicates.
critical.impact: Deleted elements reappeared with duplicate IDs on the next reactive recompute.
critical.resolution: register_remove_observer signature expanded to optionally delete the matching row from the data.frame by ID and invoke a sync callback.

critical.issue: Stakeholder Power-Interest classification silently miscategorized records in any non-English session (modules/pims_stakeholder_module.R).
critical.impact: Power-Interest grid placement, summary statistics, and Word/PNG export labels all wrong outside English.
critical.resolution: setNames() with stable HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW keys; all 7 comparison sites updated; export boundary translates back via power_interest_label() helper.

critical.issue: Response measure priority scoring silently inverted rankings in non-English sessions (modules/response_module.R).
critical.impact: Highest-impact response measures appeared at the BOTTOM of the priority table for any non-English user.
critical.resolution: Same stable-key pattern; 12 comparison sites updated; export translates via level_label().

critical.issue: Scenario Builder 'Add new link' button silently aborted when project_data was null, CLD was empty, or no scenario was selected.
critical.impact: Button appeared dead. User perceived a freeze.
critical.resolution: Replaced 3 silent req() calls with explicit guards that call showNotification() telling the user what to do.

critical.issue: Workflow stepper at top of dashboard rendered raw i18n keys (modules.workflow_stepper.step_get_started etc.) instead of translated labels.
critical.impact: Visible regression — labels read like code identifiers, not localized words.

high.issue: Two analysis modules called ns('stale_data') from server scope where ns wasn't defined.
high.impact: Runtime error when an analysis was completed and ISA then changed (stale-data notification path).

high.issue: 10 pre-existing test failures in test-reactive-pipeline.R about emit_* reading reactiveVals outside reactive context.
high.impact: Tests not green; latent risk of observers self-firing on their own emitted events.
high.resolution: Wrapped each of the 8 emit_* function bodies in shiny::isolate().

high.issue: Feedback modal submissions always recorded browser_info as 'unknown' after the ef005fb input rename.
high.impact: Lost diagnostic context on every feedback submission.
high.resolution: Read input$fb_browser_info to match the modal's setInputValue call.

high.issue: Deploy script *.png exclude was stripping www/img/MSabres.png (navbar logo).
high.impact: A v1.13.2 deploy would have rendered production with a broken navbar logo.
high.resolution: Tightened exclude to docs/images/*.png. App UI assets ship; README screenshots stay excluded.

high.issue: Deploy script wiped production-accumulated user data (data/ml_training_data.rds ~42KB, data/*_backup.json) without backup.
high.impact: Every production deploy permanently lost ML feedback accumulated since the previous deploy.
high.resolution: tar-based preserve-and-restore step wrapping the rm-rf + extract.

migration_notes: data$pims$stakeholders schema changed from lowercase numeric (id, power=numeric()) to TitleCase categorical (ID, Power=character()) — only takes effect when a stakeholder is saved; existing empty projects unaffected.
data$response_measures top-level slot added to canonical schema (measures, impacts, milestones, counter).
data$pims$engagements and data$pims$communications top-level slots added.
VERSION_INFO.json was stale at 1.11.0 through v1.13.3 — Application Info modal now correctly reflects the running version.
